textByHash.552dec37843ee77d572fea51800c67d004af5da5: What business do you have with a servant of Icthlarin?
textByHash.67cc47cd3cc27b64bbd9d757a4fb51e021fd73a7: I will not aid a defiler of the dead. Be gone!
textByHash.1a98721ebeda9f099ec2363c12e247e4b4878537: No. Nobody may enter or leave Sophanem for any reason due to the quarantine. Move along.
textByHash.a7f63aa49c5533b017bbb993548f9b2fa7eb66ca: Sorry, but Sophanem is under quarantine. No one may leave or enter.
textByHash.37b1015e9a7905abc05846cba2db0f4fe3a82453: I'm afraid my orders are clear.
textByHash.e8c37301cbb80c2ec6af3d2494c8832a554f5d89: What do you want, cursed one?
textByHash.8945967b62e3b5708913b3bd25306a68f204dcb4: A likely story. She would never reduce herself to talk to one as lowly as you, never mind help you!
textByHash.9c707ee2385ee74d3b4bb999fd4591222b0f54e4: Cursed one, why have you not yet returned the burial jar of our old leader?
textByHash.d105a2d4f52b6cefbec5fb2fc5e60c713f81963b: I wonder how someone as insignificant as you even managed to get inside the pyramid, never mind reach its heart.
textByHash.3c5f3c4ecaa513ca2c13d36a4572dedfc5c21df9: Bother me not. I am preparing for the ceremony. I'm sure even you can curb your trivial demands until after that.
textByHash.637ab8384c283ff3430b0a15c74a60b982bb1834: Yes. The High Priest has given you permission to come and go as you please.
textByHash.a19ca02a838b0dbb7544f9e5b8276cc35ff7ebbc: You have surprised me... I commend you for your efforts.
textByHash.04793c5f533c1d8b9e871a8be77a67495c2f2051: Listen! Whoever does not worship Big High War God, whether great or small, goblin or other, must die!
textByHash.e47be4f1b3490cdf59304db2f8ad0eaa3f798c3f: If another goblin tell you to worship different gods, you not listen to them! You kill them! All tribe kill them!
textByHash.008f6b76c92aa38b54391139ac7281031c212653: Kill peoples who worship different gods! Smite them! Destroy them! Do not show mercy!
textByHash.d59fb7d6bd3c61e2c57a42f43496a049ca6e5909: Enemies must die! Doubters must die! These words of Big High War God!
textByHash.379f061d97152f281f4458c9e1ec5f2179a62178: Remember, we holy people of Big High War God! He chose us to be special people, better than all people in world!
textByHash.e7fcf9c5fc3ad0b4b11fbdeefc82f800934c2c5c: Big High War God not choose us because we many, or because we strong. We nothing before he choose us! But he take us from Yu'biusk with mighty hand, and make us strong!
textByHash.a12d67b677f853e6b3473a9b89c0332ecc4d4faf: Soon Big High War God send Chosen Commander!
textByHash.21b39deb4aaa92543a8cc9c1b336fa9f32514a0e: I tell you truth! There some goblins here who not die before they see Chosen Commander coming with glory of Big High War God!
textByHash.10c10ed69dc20a6cbaaec0b00866292dfc0d7953: Then Chosen Commander lead goblins into war as one army, and we kill every other race and all followers of other gods!
textByHash.0ab5419e5c1ed16d75c79a615078ae7e85040d1a: Then Big High War God himself return and sit on throne of bronze and rull over all!
textByHash.55bc4e139608299fbb44b85b92ee914d57ee7032: Let me tell you story about Hopespear! He prophet of Big High War God! He very holy goblin!
textByHash.f446538c6fe472ec95323dc2003c694dd7e0fdc0: When Hopespear old, he walking near Goblin Village, and little goblin children came out of village and make fun of him.
textByHash.3f04a2c484fa292a5afd1b26fcc18125ba2ce4e3: The he look at them, and curse them in name of Big High War God. Then monsters come and tear children to pieces!
textByHash.4263acbc2b5d2d998879f872a6132bd69713929a: May Big High War God give you faith!
textByHash.48d632727c4c6945724ecc72a30dee5586873e87: Before you enter battle, clear mind of thought. Do not think about what you will do or what may happen.
textByHash.77cf1af499df4200420f058107acc9fa22b230ef: When battle start, Big High War God guide your arm and fill your heart with courage.
textByHash.1cd0f9f891b8ee64d6bbfae6242329672e1ae4c2: Have faith in Big High War God. He rule all war, so whatever happen in war, it his will.
textByHash.58ca3e19082448eb6b493248f9ad68c4f9d46093: Goblins great nation in time of great war!
textByHash.7a69acd94d0cc9ee86148bfea06269427abb052a: Big High War God himself lead us into battle! Then we crush enemies, we burn cities to ground, we kill every man, woman and child! Even animals!
textByHash.488b55d194c3aef63843ba96f1ac9d4217b67be3: Some enemies, we kill them so bad, now there no trace and no one ever remember them! That what happen to enemies of Big High War God!
textByHash.31bce56bacdd7d20f1fc6104d0f159d2733c66cd: Taxes? Look at this place, do you think I can afford to pay any taxes?
textByHash.9ed9fadb09f6c28726cfa904194f25d1fa62e946: As if life in this city couldn't get any worse. Where am I going to find the money?
textByHash.697cf34719b9a14c77a40e2a44a2e8034d456c2a: A knight wouldn't be telling me this, they're not allowed in West Ardougne. I don't know who you really are, but you should leave.
textByHash.47eb76d2e569cb76e1e0352ccd814f2df50eaff1: Citizens don't decide new taxes. You should leave.
textByHash.7342a3fa11c951c7a86b64fad2abc0a6d44b4aaf: What are you doing? The people need that food!
textByHash.c02dde8c5038dd849921a246a0f35e193912dd8a: Taxes? But this is a holy church of Saradomin, we are exempt from taxes.
textByHash.a44951fbc61010ade7b3c1a8307b7d17f570fca8: We'll need to use the donations from the congregation. We were hoping to use that money to build an orphanage for those who lost their parents to the plague.
textByHash.cb136fc81f0b1c968063e84af18ed3d34c80c272: It is not the job of a mourner to deal with taxes. Now, if there's nothing else, I must get to work.
textByHash.0491f4eebcce19da8da6b9763e667b3fca1b5bdb: It is not the job of a citizen to deal with taxes. Now, if there's nothing else, I must get to work.
textByHash.d3b9ef31d65f9e2f18757bf8a2a05d4ba5fc9872: Greetings. May the blessings of Icthlarin rest on your tired shoulders and set you at ease during these strange times.
textByHash.3cfeab606436ad985e181793ef8569cd7a44aa21: That's the old necropolis. It's been abandoned for a long time. In fact, you couldn't even access most of it until fairly recently.
textByHash.28e82315bcf56287c70e77273a156e42d14dfef8: It was mostly buried under the sand until a storm came in from the south.
textByHash.6c0ae12fa279615e05dc154d28d1f31461f8e22b: Not as many as you'd think. There's a lot of superstition about the place. People say that even the sand is marked by death.
textByHash.5d07a570b522bce0b63c8fdb843bacc708319ddc: Not really. The sand is probably that colour due to the amount of salt in it. Still, if it keeps people from robbing the dead, that's no bad thing.
textByHash.09000d16e7bb45fa2b81d58dbe8d7279488d77f2: Hey, hey, hey! What in the name of sweet suffering Icthlarin are you doing?
textByHash.1c7945ccc7f5a63c508243d4fb1a99824a9a52d6: All that you'll achieve by pouring that potion on me is to ruin my lovely robes.
textByHash.00e13855e5373b762aea13b09a17c85959c197da: I wish there was more I could do for these people.
textByHash.345e33975357ae65ff11badfd70c10e8cc44bc9f: It's going to take a lot of work to fix the damage done to this city.
